mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.parent_id, u.name AS manager_name, d.contact, d.location, d.sort_order FROM gw_departments d LEFT JOIN itsm_users u ON d.manager_id = u.id ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.id
SELECT d.id, d.name, d.parent_id, u.name AS manager_name, d.contact, d.location, d.sort_order FROM gw_departments d LEFT JOIN itsm_users u ON d.manager_id = u.id WHERE d.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.user_id, u.username, u.name, u.email, p.phone, d.name AS department_name, pos.name AS position_name, u.role, p.profile_image_path, p.joined_date FROM gw_user_profiles p JOIN itsm_users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_departments d ON p.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN gw_positions pos ON p.position_id = pos.id WHERE p.department_id = #{departmentId} AND u.active = true ORDER BY pos.level DESC, u.name

SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.user_id, u.username, u.name, u.email, p.phone, d.name AS department_name, pos.name AS position_name, u.role, p.profile_image_path, p.joined_date FROM gw_user_profiles p JOIN itsm_users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_departments d ON p.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN gw_positions pos ON p.position_id = pos.id WHERE u.active = true
AND ( u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') )
ORDER BY d.sort_order, pos.level DESC, u.name

SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.user_id, u.username, u.name, u.email, p.phone, d.name AS department_name, pos.name AS position_name, u.role, p.profile_image_path, p.joined_date FROM gw_user_profiles p JOIN itsm_users u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gw_departments d ON p.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN gw_positions pos ON p.position_id = pos.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, level, approval_rank FROM gw_positions ORDER BY level
